subcodes.first_line: O Ali! We made mention of thee aforetime, and the Noble One desired thy remembrance at this hour. Once again do We make mention of thee, and verily We [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی ذکرناک من قبل و اراد ذکرک النبیل فی هذا الحین ذکرناک مره اخری و انا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
